$comment: Templates + variable banks that VARIATE generation of topic-quiz and summative test items. The AI server (Gemini) or an offline generator binds 'variables' into 'questionTemplate'/'optionTemplates', resolves the correct option, and emits QuizQuestion objects matching lesson_catalog.schema.json#/$defs/QuizQuestion. Deterministic when driven by QuizAttemptRequest.seed.

questionTemplates.intent: Identify the function/role of a structure.
questionTemplates.questionTemplate: What is the main job of the {structure}?

questionTemplates.intent: Pick the correct example of a concept.
questionTemplates.questionTemplate: Which of the following is an example of {concept}?

questionTemplates.intent: Compute or recall a numeric fact (math-friendly).

variableBindings.$comment: Per-topic data the templates bind into. Keyed by topicId. Values feed correctSource/distractorSource. Real banks would be expanded from TopicContent.definition / sections.

L1-T1.definition: the soft tissue inside bones where blood cells are made
L1-T1.numericPrompt: How many bones are in an adult human body?

L1-T2.compareTrue: Voluntary muscles move by choice; involuntary muscles work automatically
compareFalse: Voluntary muscles work automatically; involuntary need thought
Both types only work while asleep
Both types can only push, never pull
L1-T2.definition: the tough cords that connect muscle to bone

L-MATH1-T1.definition: the bottom number showing total equal parts

summativeAssembly.$comment: How a summative exam is built from the above. Mirrors QuizAttemptRequest.summativeConfig.

weighting.$comment: When focusTopicIds present (remedial), multiply a topic's draw count by its weight.

deterministic.note: Same seed + same templates + same variableBindings version => identical exam on any node.

emittedItemShape.$comment: Generators MUST emit this shape so items drop straight into the frontend quiz engine.
emittedItemShape.question: string (resolved questionTemplate)
emittedItemShape.correctAnswerIndex: integer (index of correctSource value within options after shuffle)
emittedItemShape.explanation: string (why the correct option is right)
